title: What Your Screen Time Tells God About Your Priorities
caption:
Your phone already knows your priorities. So does God.

You open it before you pray. That's not a character flaw. It's a habit. And habits are how you vote on what's actually first.

The 2 a.m. scroll isn't neutral. It shapes what you want, who you envy, what you crave. Lust lives there. Envy lives there. So does the version of you that's never content.

Freedom isn't no phone. It's that the phone can wait when something more important calls. If it can't wait, something other than Christ owns your attention.

"If your right hand causes you to sin, cut it off." Matthew 5:30. He wasn't exaggerating.

What would one screen-free morning tell you about where you are with God? Try it tomorrow.

#faith #christianmen #godlymen #manofgod #phonefasting #scripture #realtalk #discipline
